title: STD CLINIC - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT STD CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides evaluation and treatment of sexually transmitted infections. Services include testing for gonorrhea, chlamydia, syphilis, vaginal infections like yeast or bacterial vaginosis, trichomoniasis, hepatitis C (if injected drugs were ever used), HIV, HPV (visual check for genital warts only, no treatment offered), and herpes (visual check only). Also offers hepatitis A and B vaccinations for individuals receiving a full STD screening. If you have chlamydia, gonorrhea, syphilis, or HIV, treatment is available, even if you were diagnosed at another clinic. Testing and treatment is also available to your partners. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 988-3700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-3700 Test Results Line (503) 988-5727 Medical Billing Customer Service (503) 988-4753 Option 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most insurance plans. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. No one will be turned away due to inability to pay, but there are some tests that may not be done. Be prepared to pay at least $50 on the day of visit. Accepts cash, checks, VISA, and MasterCard. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Community Immunization Clinic is located on the 6th floor Services: Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - SYRINGE DISPOSAL HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE PUBLIC SAFETY - MEDICATION & FIREARM SAFETY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
